questions.question_text: I’m your change partner — here to help you grow and develop, every step of the way.
Real growth starts with feedback. Which of these will help you move the needle

flashcards.fc_display_text: Ask for feedback and act on it
flashcards.bot_response: Getting your dream job is  important. I am there for you  this journey.
Financial success is necessary  in your career. I will enable you to get there!

flashcards.fc_display_text: Practice a new behaviour and get input
flashcards.bot_response: Improving your performance is critical to career growth. I am your partner in this!
Better opportunities is your gateway to  career growth. I will work hard on this!
Being an expert at what you do it necessary! I an here to build your expertise!

questions.question_text: Real change happens when you commit and others validate your growth. How will you stay accountable?

flashcards.bot_response: Knowledge is important to success, but the right attitude is super critical!
You have got that right. Your attitude often determines how far you will go!
Skill is certainly important, but the right attitude will take you farther ahead!

flashcards.fc_display_text: Check in with my team every week

questions.question_text: Great! And my role is to help you attract personal success instead of chasing it. Bringing out the best in you.
